_comment: forward_reply_done + forward_reply_done_text: menu-style mirror_forward_queue.py only (no --store/--url/--all-stores on cmdline); one Discord reply after a batch when no newer Mirror messages exist after the last completed deal. routes: destination_channel_id = <#id> in the !m line. Default command is !m lead (Walmart/Target/Lowes/Home Depot store clearance). "command": "hdnation" only for hd-clearance restock (SKU / Internet Number). command_post_channel_id = where the script POSTs the line. Optional: "forward_delay_random_minutes": "1-2" or [1,2] for mirror_forward_queue.py when --delay-random-minutes not passed. post_confirmation: timeout_seconds_hdnation (long wait for !m hdnation), success_substrings / failure_substrings (comma list or JSON array, substrings case-insensitive). forward_all_stores_order: mirror_label strings for mirror_forward_queue.py --all-stores (remaining routes append sorted by label). Checkpoints are stored per Mirror channel under mirror_forward_checkpoint.json by_channel.

post_confirmation.success_substrings: nationwide stock check, lead has been posted
post_confirmation.failure_substrings: could not fetch stock, check you have entered the correct sku
post_confirmation._comment_maintenance: If Tempo/monitor is updating, the bot posts 'being updated' then later 'has been updated'. These needles extend the wait window instead of timing out.
post_confirmation.maintenance_start_substrings: is being updated, will be back in
